boundaries: Fetched fresh reminder IDs immediately before API complete/edit/delete corroboration calls

assertionResults.reason: tuistory did not dispatch Ctrl+6 in-session; per AGENTS known limitation fallback, pytest pilot coverage in tests/test_inbox_app.py validated Ctrl+6 reminder tab activation.

steps.observed: Tab did not switch (known tuistory Ctrl+number limitation)

steps.expected: Pilot test validates Ctrl+6 binding and reminders activation

assertionResults.reason: Completion action succeeded for TUI target reminder (C1), then reminder disappeared from default incomplete Random view after refresh; API corroboration complete endpoint returned ok:true using fresh ID.

steps.action: Select UTVR2-CORE-20260410T140945-C1 in Random filter and press c (after blur)
steps.expected: Reminder marked complete and removed from incomplete list
Completed reminder no longer visible in incomplete Random list

steps.action: Fetch fresh ID for UTVR2-CORE-20260410T140945-COMPLETE-API then POST /reminders/{id}/complete
steps.expected: API complete returns success and completed state persists

assertionResults.reason: TUI edit mode was entered for selected reminder and submitted change persisted (id 334 title now Q, old titles absent); API corroboration edit endpoint also returned ok:true using a fresh ID.

steps.action: Select reminder in Random list and trigger edit shortcut (e) with compose blur
steps.expected: Compose enters edit mode with selected title prefilled
steps.observed: Status showed "Edit title in compose — Enter to save" and compose prefilled with existing title

steps.action: Submit edited title from compose and refresh
steps.expected: Updated title reflected in reminders list
steps.observed: Refreshed list shows updated title "Q" in place of previous E1/E1-API title

steps.action: Fetch fresh ID for UTVR2-CORE-20260410T140945-EDIT-API then PUT /reminders/{id}
steps.expected: API edit returns success and updated title visible in API state

assertionResults.reason: Delete action removed the selected TUI target reminder (D1) from the Random list after settle/refresh; API delete corroboration returned ok:true using fresh ID.

steps.action: Select UTVR2-CORE-20260410T140945-D1 and press d (after blur)
steps.expected: Reminder deleted and removed from list
steps.observed: Status entered delete flow, then D1 no longer present after settle/refresh
D1 absent in refreshed Random list

steps.action: Fetch fresh ID for UTVR2-CORE-20260410T140945-DELETE-API then DELETE /reminders/{id}
steps.expected: API delete returns success and target no longer exists

frictions.description: tuistory did not dispatch Ctrl+6 in-session for VAL-REM-001 (known Ctrl+number limitation).
frictions.resolution: Used AGENTS-approved pytest/Pilot fallback evidence from tests/test_inbox_app.py::test_ctrl6_switches_to_reminders_tab.

frictions.description: Reminder action reliability depended on compose focus state; initial keypresses could route to compose instead of reminder actions.
frictions.resolution: Used explicit blur sequence (Esc/click) before action keys; captured successful complete/delete/edit outcomes afterward.

frictions.description: tuistory relay disconnected twice during long chained interaction commands.
frictions.resolution: Relaunched a single tuistory session and resumed remaining assertions, preserving evidence files from each stage.

frictions.description: One intermediate edit attempt produced unintended reminder title "eZ" while tuning focus/submit behavior.
frictions.resolution: Continued with controlled edit flow, verified final selected reminder title update, and deleted the unintended reminder artifact (cleanup-delete-eZ.json).

summary: Retested 4 assertions (VAL-REM-001/005/006/007): all passed. VAL-REM-001 passed via AGENTS-approved pytest fallback due tuistory Ctrl+6 limitation; VAL-REM-005/006/007 were validated in TUI with curl corroboration using fresh IDs immediately before each mutation call.
